channel.title: [Design / UX: Customer Delight — The True Meaning] Guest Post
channel.description:
Will cover following points - True customer delight with the right design - Relation of UX and UI with customers - Tips for designing that gives customer delight
@Reyes

item.title: [Design / UX: Customer Delight — The True Meaning] Guest Post
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi @atman.rathod,

Welcome to our community and many thanks for your suggestion. There is a post on Medium with the same title which covers this topic, so I am afraid we cannot consider your guest post submission.

As per our guidelines, posts must be original and useful to the readers of our blog.

Thank you in any case for your interest and time

Read full topic
item.source: [Design / UX: Customer Delight — The True Meaning] Guest Post

item.title: [Design / UX: Customer Delight — The True Meaning] Guest Post
item.dc:creator: atman.rathod
item.description:
Will cover following points

  • True customer delight with the right design
  • Relation of UX and UI with customers
  • Tips for designing that gives customer delight

@Reyes
